objective: Decompose large TypeScript modules to reduce cognitive load
background: 19 TypeScript files in src/lib/ exceed 500 lines. Large files increase maintenance burden, reduce testability, and obscure coupling.
constraints: Do not change public API signatures
Do not remove existing test coverage
Do not refactor files not in the identified list
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Each identified file decomposed into focused sub-modules (< 400 lines each)
All imports updated and TypeScript compiles with zero errors after decomposition
New file boundaries documented with a header comment explaining the split rationale
required_outputs: Each identified file decomposed into focused sub-modules (< 400 lines each)
All imports updated and TypeScript compiles with zero errors after decomposition
New file boundaries documented with a header comment explaining the split rationale
forbidden_changes: Do not change public API signatures
Do not remove existing test coverage
Do not refactor files not in the identified list
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
